ddls:
CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "default_price" TEXT /* Default selling price of the menu item */,
  "default_cost" TEXT /* Default cost to produce the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the menu item image */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the menu item */,
  "nutritional_info" TEXT /* Detailed nutritional information */,
  "allergen_info" TEXT /* Information about allergens present in the item */,
  "vegetarian" INTEGER /* Whether the item is vegetarian */,
  "gluten_free" INTEGER /* Whether the item is gluten-free */,
  "vegan" INTEGER /* Whether the item is vegan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the ingredient */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the ingredient */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the ingredient in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier from 1 to 5 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item version */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item version */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item in this version */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost to produce the item in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the ingredient in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the last reorder was placed */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the ingredient expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sale happened */,
  "price_at_time_of_sale" TEXT /* Price of the item at the time of sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the location */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the location manager */,
  "manager_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pricing strategy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pricing strategy */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item during this strategy */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion or strategy */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount applied during the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_ingredients" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  "quantity_used" TEXT /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item affected */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient affected */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
